name: self-harness
description: Portable skill for Self-Harness and Meta-Harness trace mining with live simulated users.

interface.shortDescription: Improve agent harnesses with simulated users.
interface.longDescription: Runs a paper-grounded harness-improvement workflow inside target repos. Supports true Self-Harness when the target runtime proposes its own edits, and Meta-Harness when the external host agent proposes changes.
defaultPrompt: Use Self-Harness to evaluate this agent harness.
Simulate realistic users and propose harness improvements.
Mine traces from this agent and find failure clusters.
